meaning: 1. to treat as guilty those associated with an offender (family, neigh
sentence: 古代一人犯罪，家人也可能受到连坐。
pinyin: Gǔdài yī rén fànzuì, jiārén yě kěnéng shòudào liánzuò.
english: In ancient times, if one person committed a crime, family members could also be implicated.

sentence: 珠江三角洲是中国重要的经济区域。
pinyin: Zhūjiāng sānjiǎozhōu shì Zhōngguó zhòngyào de jīngjì qūyù.
english: The Pearl River Delta is an important economic region in China.

sentence: 他靠外卡入围了今年的网球公开赛。
pinyin: Tā kào wài kǎ rù wéi le jīn nián de wǎng qiú gōng kāi sài.
english: He got into this year's tennis open with a wild card entry.

sentence: 我们家换了数字电视，频道多了很多。
pinyin: Wǒ men jiā huàn le shù zì diàn shì, pín dào duō le hěn duō.
english: We switched to digital television at home, and now there are many more channels.

sentence: 这个城市靠海，水产资源很丰富。
pinyin: Zhè ge chéng shì kào hǎi, shuǐ chǎn zī yuán hěn fēng fù.
english: This city is by the sea, so aquatic resources are very abundant.
